zh.Schorisse, , , Oost-Vlaanderen, België: 比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫馬爾克達爾利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnoldus V van Gavere於1325年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫馬爾克達爾利時，他的父親Arnoldus IV van Gavere20歲，母親Joanna van Rode15歲。他和Joanna van Zottegem至少有1個兒子。他去世於1385年享年60歲。

zh-hans.Schorisse, , , Oost-Vlaanderen, België: 比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫馬爾克達爾利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnoldus V van Gavere于1325年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫馬爾克達爾利时，他的父亲Arnoldus IV van Gavere20岁，母亲Joanna van Rode15岁。他和Joanna van Zottegem至少有1个儿子。他去世于1385年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Gavere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Francois, Michel.

variants.name: Lariviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Fernand, Marcel, Adelard, Andre, Gaston, Philibert, Aime, Alcide, Alphonse, Antoine.
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Larivière or La Rivière, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnoldus V van Gavere was born in 1325, in Schorisse, Maarkedal, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Arnoldus IV van Gavere, was 20 and his mother, Joanna van Rode, was 15. He had at least 1 son with Joanna van Zottegem. He died in 1385, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnoldus V van Gavere est né en 1325, à Schorisse, Maarkedal, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Arnoldus IV van Gavere, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Joanna van Rode, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Joanna van Zottegem. Il est décédé en 1385, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnoldus V van Gavere 1325 in Schorisse, Maarkedal, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnoldus IV van Gavere 20 und seine Mutter Joanna van Rode 15. Er hatte mit Joanna van Zottegem mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1385 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoldus V van Gavere è nato il nel 1325 nel Schorisse, Maarkedal, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Arnoldus IV van Gavere, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Joanna van Rode, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Joanna van Zottegem. Morì nel 1385, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.Schorisse, , , Oost-Vlaanderen, België: ベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンマアルケダルスチオリッセ
ja.lifeSummary: Arnoldus V van Gavereが1325年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンマアルケダルスチオリッセで生まれた時，父Arnoldus IV van Gavereは20歳，母Joanna van Rodeは15歳であった。彼はJoanna van Zottegemとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1385年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnoldus V van Gavere(이)가 1325년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 마아르케들 슈리스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnoldus IV van Gavere(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna van Rode(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Joanna van Zottegem(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1385년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnoldus V van Gavere nasceu em 1325, em Schorisse, Maarkedal, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Arnoldus IV van Gavere, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Joanna van Rode, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Joanna van Zottegem. Ele faleceu em 1385, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnoldus V van Gavere родился в 1325 г. в местности щаурисс, мааркедаль, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Arnoldus IV van Gavere было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Joanna van Rode, 15. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Joanna van Zottegem. Он умер в 1385 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arnoldus V van Gavere nació en 1325, en Schorisse, Maarkedal, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Arnoldus IV van Gavere, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Joanna van Rode, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Joanna van Zottegem. Murió en 1385, a la edad de 60 años.
